content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad market firm with Pharma (+2.05%), Auto (+0.82%), PSU Bank (+0.90%) leading. VIX compressed -2.4% to 17.48. Global cues positive (S&P +0.81%, Nasdaq +1.03%). Book is well-deployed at 65% with most positions green. Focus is on managing winners and trailing SLs, not adding cluster risk.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.4%, comfortably in profit. Current SL 1025.86 already above entry. Tightening minimally to 1030 (still 1.6% below CMP 1047, comfortable trail-gap). Q4 beat, sub-1% GNPA, ICICI BUY TP 1350. Hold for target 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Recovered to -0.8% from earlier dip. SL 119 well below CMP 124.18 (4.2% buffer). Defensive hedge in place; gold bounced today despite easing geopolitics narrative. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.7%, CMP 1729.50 near 52w high 1748.60. Promoter stake sale at 1632 was absorbed by Capital Group; cargo +15% YoY. Tightening SL to 1715 (0.84% below CMP) — wait, that violates 1% trail-gap rule. Setting SL to 1710 (1.13% below CMP) — already at 1710. Raising to 1712 still <1%. Keeping SL at 1710 (current), no MODIFY needed → changing to HOLD reasoning: trail-gap discipline forbids tighter SL here."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.1%, CMP 207.24 vs SL 206. Thesis intact: Q4 PAT +68%, GNPA -140 bps, CLSA TP 220. Underperformance vs PSU bank index is relative, not thesis-breaking. SL very close — let it work to either SL or upside continuation."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4595.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.7%, CMP 4652. Current SL 4595 already at breakeven+. Trail-gap to CMP is 1.2% — at the threshold. Holding stored SL 4595, no real MODIFY needed. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2.1%, CMP 7045 near lifetime high 7200. SL 6950 is 1.35% below CMP — tight enough. Q4 PAT +114%, EBITDA margin 34.3%, Geojit TP 8500. Hold for target 7400."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.3%, CMP 837.90. SL 825 is 1.5% below — proper trail-gap. Gap-up consolidating intraday (high 862, now 837). Jefferies Buy TP 810, Naval expansion catalyst. Let SL work."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.4%, CMP 368.50. SL 358 (2.9% below). Q4 PAT +30%, NBFC AUM +27%, Motilal TP 325 raised. Stock at/near 52w high 369.30 — letting setup play out."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.8%, CMP 821.40, broke above 52w high. Q4 PAT +18%, India volume +9%, FY27 guide >15000 Cr. SL 812 (1.1% below) — adequate trail-gap. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.1%, CMP 3277, SL 3245 (1% below). Q4 PAT +48.5%, Auto sector leading. Intraday faded from high 3315; SL close. Let it work."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1259.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2.0%, gap-up Q4 results. SL already at entry 1259 (breakeven, 2.1% below CMP 1286). No-op MODIFY — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.1%, CMP 3028.70 vs entry 3025. SL 2900 (4.2% below). Defence cluster — already cluster-heavy with HAL+TITAGARH+GRSE. Letting SL absorb noise. Q4 PAT +24%, corvette L1 catalyst pending."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up modestly from 1025.86 to 1030 (1.6% below CMP, respects 1% gap rule). Locks in additional profit on +6.4% winner."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL further would violate 1% trail-gap rule (CMP 1729.50, SL 1710 = 1.13% gap). Hold current SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 4595 already at breakeven. Trail-gap to CMP 4652 is 1.2% — at threshold. No tighter MODIFY without violating self-stopout rule."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; SL adequate buffer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL very close to CMP; let market resolve."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 6950 is 1.35% below CMP 7045 — proper trail-gap, can't tighten further."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 825 is 1.5% below CMP — proper trail-gap."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Slight loss; SL gives room for setup to play."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 812 is 1.1% below CMP — at proper gap."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 3245 close to CMP; let market resolve thesis."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry 1259 = breakeven, 2.1% below CMP. Adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Just entered; SL 2900 (4.2% below) gives room for thesis. Defence cluster already concentrated — not adding."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Several attractive setups today (M&M, AJANTPHARM, COFORGE post-results, GRSE, TITAGARH) are already represented in the book. AURO/AJANTPHARM pharma breakouts deserve a look on pullbacks. WOCKPHARMA +22% is a fade-or-chase candidate — pass without confirmation. CAMS gap-up, VEDL near 52w high, HFCL (already have pending order) on watch. Cancel HFCL pending order: 449 minutes old, market has moved away from 133.50 entry — order stale.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 65% deployed with 12 CNC positions — well-diversified but heavy on Capital Goods cluster (HAL+GRSE+TITAGARH = ~3 names). NO new entries in Capital Goods/Defence today (cluster cap reached). NO new entries in Financials cluster (PNBHOUSING+BANDHANBNK+ABCAPITAL already 3 names). Today's discipline: no new BUYs — focus on managing existing winners. Cancelling stale HFCL pending order separately. Cumulative P&L still negative (-0.6% trough recovered to +0.57%); priority is preserving today's +0.38% gain and protecting trailing SLs.",
  "decisions_addendum_cancel_orders": [
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "reasoning": "BUY LIMIT 133.50 placed 449min ago has not filled; HFCL up +8.5% today, price has moved well away from limit. Stale order — cancel rather than let it sit."
    }
  ]
}
